onlisttools(o){this.setRequestHandler(xp,(i,l)=>o(i.params,l))}assertCapabilityForMethod(o){}assertRequestHandlerCapability(o){switch(o){case"tools/call":case"tools/list":if(!this._capabilities.tools)throw Error(`Client does not support tool capability (required for ${o})`);return;case"ping":case"ui/resource-teardown":return;default:throw Error(`No handler for method ${o} registered`)}}assertNotificationCapability(o){}assertTaskCapability(o){throw Error("Tasks are not supported in MCP Apps")}assertTaskHandlerCapability(o){throw Error("Task handlers are not supported in MCP Apps")}async callServerTool(o,i){if(typeof o=="string")throw Error(`callServerTool() expects an object as its first argument, but received a string ("${o}"). Did you mean: callServerTool({ name: "${o}", arguments: { ... } })?`);return await this.request({method:"tools/call",params:o},as,i)}async readServerResource(o,i){return await this.request({method:"resources/read",params:o},wp,i)}async listServerResources(o,i){return await this.request({method:"resources/list",params:o},_p,i)}sendMessage(o,i){return this.request({method:"ui/message",params:o},_S,i)}sendLog(o){return this.notification({method:"notifications/message",params:o})}updateModelContext(o,i){return this.request({method:"ui/update-model-context",params:o},Ra,i)}openLink(o,i){return this.request({method:"ui/open-link",params:o},vS,i)}sendOpenLink=this.openLink;downloadFile(o,i){return this.request({method:"ui/download-file",params:o},yS,i)}requestDisplayMode(o,i){return this.request({method:"ui/request-display-mode",params:o},RS,i)}sendSizeChanged(o){return this.notification({method:"ui/notifications/size-changed",params:o})}setupSizeChangedNotifications(){let o=!1,i=0,l=0,u=()=>{o||(o=!0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{o=!1;let f=document.documentElement,m=f.style.width,v=f.style.height;f.style.width="fit-content",f.style.height="max-content";let k=f.getBoundingClientRect();f.style.width=m,f.style.height=v;let P=window.innerWidth-f.clientWidth,w=Math.ceil(k.width+P),j=Math.ceil(k.height);(w!==i||j!==l)&&(i=w,l=j,this.sendSizeChanged({width:w,height:j}))}))};u();let d=new ResizeObserver(u);return d.observe(document.documentElement),d.observe(document.body),()=>d.disconnect()}async connect(o=new pS(window.parent,window.parent),i){if(this.transport)throw Error("App is already connected. Ba={aperçu:{color:C.warning,bg:C.warningDim,label:"Aperçu"},apercu:{color:C.warning,bg:C.warningDim,label:"Aperçu"},pending:{color:C.text.muted,bg:C.bg.elevated,label:"En attente"},processing:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"En traitement"},valid:{color:C.success,bg:C.successDim,label:"Valide"},invalid:{color:C.error,bg:C.errorDim,label:"Invalide"},duplicated:{color:C.warning,bg:C.warningDim,label:"Doublon"},wrong_routing:{color:C.error,bg:C.errorDim,label:"Erreur routage"},delivered:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"Livrée"},not_delivered:{color:C.error,bg:C.errorDim,label:"Non livrée"},delivery_pending:{color:C.text.muted,bg:C.bg.elevated,label:"Livraison en cours"},converted:{color:C.success,bg:C.successDim,label:"Convertie"},conversion_failed:{color:C.error,bg:C.errorDim,label:"Conversion échouée"},submitted:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"Soumise"},issued:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"Émise"},received:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"Reçue"},made_available:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"Mise à disposition"},in_hand:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"Prise en charge"},approved:{color:C.success,bg:C.successDim,label:"Approuvée"},partially_approved:{color:C.warning,bg:C.warningDim,label:"Partiellement approuvée"},completed:{color:C.success,bg:C.successDim,label:"Complétée"},payment_sent:{color:C.success,bg:C.successDim,label:"Paiement envoyé"},payment_received:{color:C.success,bg:C.successDim,label:"Paiement reçu"},suspended:{color:C.warning,bg:C.warningDim,label:"Suspendue"},disputed:{color:C.warning,bg:C.warningDim,label:"Contestée"},refused:{color:C.error,bg:C.errorDim,label:"Refusée"},rejected:{color:C.error,bg:C.errorDim,label:"Rejetée"},cancelled:{color:C.text.faint,bg:C.bg.elevated,label:"Annulée"},deposited:{color:C.info,bg:C.infoDim,label:"Déposée"}};function Cp(n){return Ba[n.toLowerCase()]??{color:C.text.muted,bg:C.bg.elevated,label:n}}function AS(n){return Ba[n.toLowerCase()]?.label??n}function ZS(n,o){return o==="received"&&["delivered","in_hand","disputed"].includes(n.toLowerCase())}function FS(n,o){return o==="received"&&["approved","partially_approved"].includes(n.toLowerCase())}function US(n,o){return o==="sent"&&["approved","partially_approved","delivered"].includes(n.toLowerCase())}const
